name: Capstone Starter (Codespaces fallback)
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -e; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends make postgresql-client; pip install --user uv'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'set -e; if [ -n "$CODESPACE_NAME" ]; then URL="https://${CODESPACE_NAME}-8080.${GITHUB_CODESPACES_PORT_FORWARDING_DOMAIN}"; touch .env; grep -q "^AIRFLOW_BASE_URL=" .env && sed -i "s#^AIRFLOW_BASE_URL=.*#AIRFLOW_BASE_URL=$URL#" .env || echo "AIRFLOW_BASE_URL=$URL" >> .env; echo "Set AIRFLOW_BASE_URL=$URL — restart the stack with: make down && make up"; fi'

postAttachCommand.hint: echo 'Run: make up   (then open the forwarded port for the Airflow UI)'
